title: phyllanthus ovatus
intro: Phyllanthus ovatus, also known as the green gold or green gold of the forest, is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. It is widely used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating liver and kidney diseases, and protecting against certain types of cancer. In traditional herbal medicine, Phyllanthus ovatus is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are also used in the form of capsules or tablets for various health conditions.
